stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the total fuel required for the Commercial Air Transport flight in a Medium Range Jet Transport MRJT aeroplane, given the following information? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Estimated taxi time: 10 minutes at the departure aerodrome and 5 minutes at the destination aerodrome
APU fuel flow: 115 kg/h
Taxi fuel flow: 11 kg/min
Planned APU usage at the parking position: Zero
Total trip distance: 748 NM
Average fuel flow: 2618 kg/h
TAS: 421 kt
Head wind component: 24 kt
Contingency Fuel: 5% of the Trip Fuel
Alternate Fuel: 550 kg
Holding fuel flow: 2250 kg/h
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
